name: The Gates of Miden'nir
description:
You are standing on a small, dusty path leading away from Wardome City,
to the forest of Miden'Nir (Goblinic for 'Green Blood'). You can still
see the road to the city to the north, but if you go south,
there is fresh air and greenery.

exits.description: The road thought the plains is in that way.
You can see the walls of the South Gate.
If you go south, you will enter the Miden'Nir.
